template: K-only vs V-only vs K+V PGD (exp_031 script)
key_finding: PGD null space lives in K-space: K-only PGD 3/32 answer changes (9.4%), V-only 0/32 (0%), KV-both 0/31 (0%). K uses 8x less perturbation energy than V. UNIFIES null space + K>V findings.
evidence_impact: Moderate — qualitative K>V asymmetry in PGD confirmed. The null space is a routing phenomenon. But overall success rate is low (9.4%) and marginally significant (Fisher p=0.12).
next_planned: Priority: (1) Targeted K-only PGD (specific wrong answer) for higher success. (2) Third model family for K>V replication. (3) Evidence consolidation — 32 cycles of findings need narrative synthesis. (4) K-only PGD with late-layer-only perturbation.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space. K-only PGD succeeds (9.4%), V-only never does (0%). Null space is smaller than Exp 4 claimed but K-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED on spatial selectivity. Geometric/distributed confirmed by literature

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal. Explained by attention sinks at early positions

geometric_dissociation.status: K-V dissociation CROSS-MODEL REPLICATED and now UNIFIED with null space via K-only PGD

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. Sparse attention explains V immunity

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for K>V (2 families x 3 positions). Need 3rd family

encoding_strategy.status: Digital/analog distinction confirmed. K-specific null space on Qwen

superadditive_interaction.status: Llama-specific (7.9-16.8x). Weak on Qwen. Routing+throughput cascade

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent groups. Gradient bottleneck. QK/OV framework grounds K>V. K-only PGD is novel experimental validation

null_space_kv_unification.status: NEW: K-only PGD unifies null space (Exp 4) with K>V (Exps 23-29). The adversarial channel operates through routing, not content.
